creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
In message <201011252140.oAPLeMIC000931@freefall.freebsd.org>, you wrote:

>Awaiting maintainers feedback (via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool)

Thank you.

(In fact, there seems to be some actually dire consequences of whatever
this bug actually is... I cannot even build SpamAssassin now!  The
install scripts seem to think that I don't have an up-to-date version of
the p5-Archive-Tar port installed... but I *do*!  But I will wait and
see what the maintainer has to say before fileing another PR.)
